examples: An illustration of China's dynamism is that a new company is formed in Shanghai every 11 seconds.
The challenge of coping with automation underlines the need for the U.S. to revive its fading business dynamism.
The challenge of coping with automation underlines the need for the U.S. to revive its fading business dynamism: Starting new companies must be made easier.
It has a dramatic history (thanks, Eva Peron), artistic and creative bona fides and city-wide dynamism.
This dynamism helps explain why America has been growing so much faster than Europe.
